message:
fix: correct transpile_to_fts5 test assertion and stale comments for hyphen-preserving tokenizer

The frankensearch rev 472322f changed cass_sanitize_query to preserve
hyphens, but the transpile_to_fts5 test still expected the old behavior
where "foo-bar" was split into "(foo AND bar)". Updated the assertion
and four stale comments that referenced the old splitting behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
